name: Mushroom Foo Yung
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium-sized bowl, beat together all ingredients except oil and soya sauce.
2. Heat a small amount of cooking oil in a large skillet (or Wok) over medium heat.
3. Drop large spoonfuls (about 2 tablespoons or 25 ml) into the skillet.
4. Cook, turning once, until lightly browned. Repeat until all egg mixture is used.
5. Serve with soya sauce.
